title: Kick streamer Clavicular launches looksmaxxing summit with exclusive VIP yacht experience
summary_full: Popular streamer Clavicular, also known as Braden Peters, is hosting 'The Ascension Summit' in Miami next month. This event offers fans insights into his 'looksmaxxing' journey, focusing on appearance, confidence, and fitness. Ticket options range from virtual access to an exclusive, limited VIP yacht experience. The summit aims to share his personal growth strategies, marking a significant expansion of his brand into real-world events.
